topic.title: Prof. Nina Harris - Office Hours - INFO7375 37286 ST: Branding and AI SEC 05 Spring 2026 - Fridays @1:00EST
topic.text:
Topic: Prof. Nina Harris - Office Hours - INFO7375 37286 ST: Branding and AI
Time: Jan 16, 2026 01:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)
        Every week on Fri, until May 15, 2026, 18 occurrence(s)
Please download and import the following iCalendar (.ics) files to calendar system.
